<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type t
  val to_list : Fcm_notif.Options.t -> (string * Yojson.Safe.t) list
  val create : string list -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_raw_string :
    string -> string -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_raw_json :
    string -> Yojson.Safe.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_to : string -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_condition : string -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_collapse_key : string -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  module Priority : sig type t = Normal | High end
  val add_priority :
    Fcm_notif.Options.Priority.t ->
    Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_content_available :
    bool -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_time_to_live : int -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_restricted_package_name :
    string -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
  val add_dry_run : bool -> Fcm_notif.Options.t -> Fcm_notif.Options.t
end >>
